flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 28% at SUNY Corning Community College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.2k vs 1.7k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at SUNY Corning Community College fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (1.5k → 1.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at SUNY Corning Community College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.2k → $10.3k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at SUNY Corning Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.2% → 0.0%).
